mapper.insert:
insert into base_logistics_netside
config_code, config_name, delivery_type, logistics_id, logistics_code, logistics_name, platform_code, platform_name, state, group_id, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, modified_by, modified_name, modified_date, version, deleted_flag,
#{configCode}, #{configName}, #{deliveryType}, #{logisticsId}, #{logisticsCode}, #{logisticsName}, #{platformCode}, #{platformName}, #{state}, #{groupId}, #{serviceProviderId}, #{serviceProviderName}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdName}, #{createdDate}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedName}, #{modifiedDate}, #{version}, #{deletedFlag},
mapper.update:
update base_logistics_netside
state = #{state},
deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag},
modified_by = #{modifiedBy},
modified_name = #{modifiedName},
modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into base_logistics_netside_detail (config_id, sys_netsite_code, sys_netsite_name, netsite_code, netsite_name, province, province_code, city, city_code, area, area_code, town, town_code, address_detail, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, version, deleted_flag) values
( #{item.configId},#{item.sysNetsiteCode},#{item.sysNetsiteName},#{item.netsiteCode}, #{item.netsiteName},#{item.province},#{item.provinceCode},#{item.city}, #{item.cityCode},#{item.area},#{item.areaCode},#{item.town},#{item.townCode},#{item.addressDetail},#{item.state},#{item.remark},#{item.createdBy},#{item.createdName}, #{item.createdDate},#{item.version},#{item.deletedFlag} )
